details:
Reading the linux CI job log for PR #1254 (base 0db599f) yields two
materially new facts that update prior observations:

1. RESOLVED: the resource_unit_tests / for_unit_tests plugin-load break is
   fixed. This run reports "100% tests passed, 0 tests failed out of 10",
   including resource_unit_tests (0.07s). Earlier this suite was red main-wide
   (all Python plugins failed to load), which observation #1259 cited as the
   functional gate on row 22 #670 "Define and enforce the Python
   resource-plugin trust boundary". That specific gate is now lifted.

2. NEW/WORSE: the native `linux` red is now driven by the gameplay suite
   (python3 test.py --suite gameplay), not unit tests. Failures observed:
   - SIGABRT crashes: "terminate called without an active exception";
     test shards 1/2/4 fail with exit code -6.
   - Shard 3 times out after 1109s (exit 124).
   - Individual FAILs incl. test_map_walkthrough_ninemarches,
     test_map_walkthrough_sunderedmarch, test_nouraajd_victor_reward_unlock_regression,
     test_player_progression_through_level_six_unlocks_once_per_class.
   This sharpens the prior "gameplay-walkthrough gate red swarm-wide (huge-map
   timeouts)" (#1227): it now includes hard aborts, not just timeouts.

Consequence for the queue: four archetype worker PRs orphaned by dead
controller ctrl-vm-4039 -- #1251 (E07/S04 MCP read-only inspection),
#1252 (E07/S03 objectRef), #1254 (E04/S05 class/race combination test),
#1255 (E07/S02 race/class tooltips), rows 90/89/60/88 -- are red ONLY via
this shared gameplay gate. Each PR's own added test passes where visible
(e.g. #1254's test_every_class_race_combination passed at 0.333s). The rows
are flagged reclaimable (lease expired ~46m) but MUST NOT be reclaimed:
that would mark complete, PR-backed work as NOT_STARTED and invite redo.
They need a controller/human able to merge-on-unstable (linux non-required)
or to fix the gameplay crash first.

evidence.unitSuite: for_unit_tests 100% passed incl resource_unit_tests 0.07s -> plugin-load break resolved

evidence.gameplaySuite: SIGABRT terminate called without an active exception; shards 1/2/4 exit -6; shard 3 timeout 1109s exit 124

evidence.guidance: leave for fleet; do not reclaim (PR-backed)

impact: Every native PR's linux job is red via the shared gameplay crash/timeout, not its own change; 4 complete archetype PRs (#1251/1252/1254/1255) sit unmerged and their reclaimable rows must not be reclaimed (would discard PR-backed work); #670's plugin-load gate is now lifted
suggestedImprovement: Diagnose/fix the gameplay-suite SIGABRT (terminate called without an active exception) and huge-map shard timeout so native linux reflects per-PR correctness; adopt-and-merge the 4 orphaned ctrl-vm-4039 archetype PRs on unstable; re-evaluate #670 now that its plugin-load gate is lifted
summary: resource_unit_tests break RESOLVED (unit suite green, lifts #670 gate); native linux now red via gameplay-suite SIGABRT + shard timeout; 4 archetype PRs orphaned by dead ctrl-vm-4039
